name: OCR Scanner (EasyOCR)
description: Detects and reads text using EasyOCR, merges text fragments, isolates text regions using contours and filling, and overlays a colored rendering of the recognized text.

name: Movement Analysis (MOG2)
description: Detects moving objects using background subtraction (MOG2) and extracts their contours.

name: Harris Corner Detection
description: Detects corner features in an image using the Harris corner detection operator.

name: Smile Detector
description: Detects smiles in real-time via MediaPipe by measuring mouth corner distance, records frame data, and exports results to CSV.

name: YOLO Object Detection
description: Object detection on static images using YOLOv11. Displays bounding boxes, object count, and a list of detected objects.

name: SORT Multi-Object Tracking
description: Real-time multi-object tracking: YOLO detects objects while SORT assigns persistent IDs using a Kalman Filter and the Hungarian algorithm.

name: DeepSORT Multi-Object Tracking
description: Multi-object tracking with visual re-identification: Combines YOLO and DeepSORT (Kalman filtering + CNN embeddings) for stable IDs even through temporary occlusions.

name: Pebble Segmenter
description: Segments individual pebbles using a watershed algorithm: applies Otsu thresholding, morphological cleanup, distance transform, marker area filtering, and shape analysis.

name: Interactive Magic Painter
description: Draw on screen using hand landmarks tracked in real time.

name: Ghost Motion Trail
description: Creates an artistic motion trail by blending moving objects and background frames over time.

name: Feature Matching (ORB)
description: Compares two images and identifies similarities using ORB keypoint detection and a Brute-Force matcher.

name: Warp Affine: Animated Transform
description: Applies an animated affine transformation (oscillating rotation and zoom) calculated dynamically by a Python node.

name: Python: Image Stats
description: A custom Python script node that inverts an image and computes its average brightness.

name: Sprint Race Tracker
description: Detects and tracks runners in a sprint video using SORT, assigning a unique persistent ID to each athlete.

name: EVM Pulse Detector (Wu et al. 2012)
description: Eulerian Video Magnification (EVM) — detects heart rate by amplifying subtle color variations (Cr/Cb) in a face video.

name: Gaze & Head Pose Analyzer
description: Combines Head Pose (solvePnP) and ETH-XGaze gaze estimation. Face Tracker feeds landmarks to Head Pose, which draws 3D axes on the face. Gaze Estimator overlays the gaze direction arrow. Live plots show gaze yaw and pitch in real time.

name: Region Props & Population Analysis
description: Segments beads/particles using Otsu thresholding and morphological operations, extracts region properties (area, circularity, solidity, eccentricity, intensity), and visualizes the population using two false-color heatmaps. Includes CSV export.

name: Sediment Conductivity Analysis
description: Multi-layer analysis of sediment conductivity. Loads a 5×100×100 CSV grid, visualizes each layer with Matrix Distribution, computes custom indices (ratio, difference) using the Geophysics Index node, and calculates band statistics to produce a final composite map.

name: Root Anatomy Analysis
description: High-throughput phenotyping of root cross-sections. Segments RXSA, TSA, Cortex, Aerenchyma lacunae, Xylem vessels and cortical cells following the RootScan methodology.

name: Thin Section Petrography
description: Segments mineral grains from polarized light microscopy images (XPL + PPL). Detects opaque minerals, builds per-grain watershed markers, segments grains, and exports shape descriptors (area, circularity, aspect ratio, intensity) to CSV.

name: IMU Phase Space (M5StickC Plus2)
description: Visualizes accelerometer and gyroscope data from an M5StickC Plus2 in a 2D phase space. Features a 2x3 dashboard displaying Accel XY/XZ/YZ and Gyro XY/XZ/YZ with colored motion trails and fadeout. Connects via serial port CSV stream.

name: Sentinel-2 Marine Turbidity Mapping
description: End-to-end coastal turbidity mapping pipeline. Loads Sentinel-2 L2A bands (B03/B04/B08/B11), normalizes to reflectance, calculates the MNDWI water mask, performs sun glint correction (NIR deglint), and applies the bio-optical Nechad 2010 model to generate a colorized NTU map and export as a GeoTIFF.

name: Gaze Heatmap
description: Cumulative gaze heatmap generation. Captures webcam feed, runs ETH-XGaze estimation, maps vectors to screen space (with integrated calibration), and overlays a dynamic, cumulative heatmap (Jet colormap).

name: SAM 2: Interactive Segmentation
description: High-precision interactive segmentation powered by Meta's SAM 2. Segment any object using positive/negative points or bounding boxes (from YOLO or manual cropping).

name: Sphere Counting (Hough Circles)
description: Optimized workflow for counting and visualizing spherical objects (beads, grains, cells). Employs bilateral filtering to reduce specular reflections and CLAHE contrast enhancement prior to Hough circle detection.

name: Analyse d'Empreintes — Cours CV
description: Pipeline pédagogique pour l'analyse forensique d'empreintes de chaussures : seuillage, morphologie, détection de contours, et analyse géométrique (BBox / OBB). 7 étapes annotées en français.

name: Hematology — Blood Cell Count (CBC)
description: Veterinary complete blood count (CBC) pipeline processing two parallel color-separated channels. Pink channel (R-B) extracts RBCs via watershed segmentation and size filtering. Purple channel (B*0.5 + R*0.3 - G*0.8) isolates WBCs (via watershed) and platelets (via size filtering). Features a highly adjustable 24-node, 42-connection pipeline and compiles a structured CBC report (species, patient info, diagnostic interpretation).
